texto: What is particularly striking about his reconstruction and criticisms of the traditional account of friendship is that he finds it deficient not only by the light of his own Christian viewpoint; he also finds friendship deficient when judged from the perspective of its own self-proclaimed ethical foundations. Thus, Kierkegaard concludes that the reciprocity involved in friendship actually betrays its essential selfishness.
explicacao: Citação de Graham Smith sobre temas ligados a amizade. “What is particularly striking about his reconstruction and criticisms of the traditional account …” articula amizade, despair, kiekegaard em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e amizade.
